review.resolution: peak_ratio alarm explained by differential window bias at distinct argmax times; keep as reviewed diagnostic, do not promote peak_ratio

protocol.sampled_variant: snapshots interpolated only to K=32 radii read from 3D
protocol.time_interpolation: numpy linear interpolation within contiguous strong segments; no extrapolation or filling outside strong phase

l_gt0_transfer_gate.status: moot for C2 because own-truth TRUTH_SCAN floor ≥ effect
l_gt0_transfer_gate.future_rule: median ≤3% and p95 ≤5% on common support after excluding two points adjacent to every segment edge

protocol.normalization: sqrt(4pi) for l=0 truth dev; unity for l>=1; c invariant

excluded_mass_lumped_series.reason: mass lumping rejected in frozen F2 production
